# [LinuxOS] init-org.el

```default
;;; init-org.el --- Org mode configuration (Linux optimized)

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Core Org settings
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package org
  :ensure t
  :hook ((org-mode . org-indent-mode)
         (org-mode . visual-line-mode))

  :config
  (setq org-log-done 'time
        org-startup-folded 'content
        org-hide-emphasis-markers t
        org-pretty-entities t
        org-return-follows-link t
        org-startup-with-inline-images t
        org-image-actual-width '(600)))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Modern Org appearance (clean UI)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(use-package org-modern
  :ensure t
  :hook (org-mode . org-modern-mode)
  :config
  (setq org-modern-star 'replace
        org-modern-hide-stars 'leading
        org-modern-table nil))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Source code blocks (very important for research)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(setq org-src-fontify-natively t
      org-src-tab-acts-natively t
      org-confirm-babel-evaluate nil)

;; Allow commonly used languages (Quarto + research workflow)
(org-babel-do-load-languages
 'org-babel-load-languages
 '((emacs-lisp . t)
   (python . t)
   (R . t)
   (latex . t)
   (shell . t)))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Better LaTeX integration (AUCTeX-friendly Linux setup)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(setq org-latex-prefer-user-labels t
      org-export-with-LaTeX-fragments t)

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Org file behavior
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(setq org-auto-align-tags nil
      org-tags-column 0)

;; Better cycling experience
(setq org-cycle-separator-lines 1)

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Optional: nicer writing experience
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(add-hook 'org-mode-hook
          (lambda ()
            (visual-line-mode 1)
            (flyspell-mode 1)))

(provide 'init-org)
;;; init-org.el ends here
```
